description: Built-in agent roles. Each is a configured row under `agents:` in project.yml — provider, prompt template, permission profile, and any skills.

agents.role: Reads the task brief and produces a plan.
agents.reads: Task description, project rules, .amaco/roles/planner.md prompt, attached skills.

agents.role: Expands the plan with implementation specifics.
agents.writes: Architecture artifact (module map, interfaces, data flow).

agents.role: Applies code changes in the run's worktree.
agents.reads: Plan, architecture, review findings if any.
agents.writes: File edits in the worktree; execution log.

agents.reads: Review findings, validation logs, current diff.

agents.role: Critiques the diff against the plan.
agents.writes: Findings + a review decision (APPROVED / CHANGES_REQUESTED / BLOCKED).
Verification decision (PASSED / FAILED / NEEDS_HUMAN) + decision summary.
